title: TransDigm Third Quarter Earnings Report and Conference Call Set for Tuesday, August 8, 2023
text: CLEVELAND , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) today said it will report fiscal 2023 third quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, August 8, 2023. A conference call will follow at 11:00 a.m.

title: Why TransDigm Stock Soared Higher in June
